notable_phrases: AI business has now surpassed an annual revenue run rate of $13 billion, up 175% year-over-year
near-term execution issues were in the non-AI ACR component
you would rather win the new than just protect the past
summary: Microsoft reported strong AI momentum with $13B run rate but acknowledged execution challenges in non-AI Azure scale motions while maintaining confidence in capacity expansion and H2 acceleration.
change_summary: No material changes detected vs 2025 Q1; scores broadly stable QoQ.
